LAW AND MOTION, 302, HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. MATTER CALLED. NO ARGUMENT IS HELD. THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: OFF CALENDAR. THE VALENCIA DECLARATION PROVIDES THAT PARTIES WERE UNABLE TO MEET AND CONFER, AS REQUIRED BY CCP 430.41. PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND COMFER IMMEDIATELY. RESPONSIVE PLEADINGS ARE NOW DUE BY MARCH 25, 2024. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, BAILIFF: PARK. NOT REPORTED. (302/RCE)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-23-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
Sandra Habib, Esq. for General Motors LLC;
No appearance by any other party or counsel at the time that this matter was called.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Matter called. No argument is held. Ms. Habib notes that she is not contesting the tentative ruling.

At the conclusion of Ms. Habib's comment, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

Off calendar. The Valencia declaration provides that parties were unable to meet and confer, as required by CCP 430.41. Parties are ordered to meet and comfer immediately. Responsive pleadings are now due by March 25, 2024.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Bailiff: Park. Not Reported. (302/RCE)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-23-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
Sandra Habib, Esq. for General Motors LLC;
No appearance by any other party or counsel at the time that this matter was called.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Matter called. No argument is held. Ms. Habib notes that she is not contesting the tentative ruling.

At the conclusion of Ms. Habib's comment, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

Off calendar. The Valencia declaration provides that parties were unable to meet and confer, as required by CCP 435.5. Parties are ordered to meet and comfer immediately. Responsive pleadings are now due by March 25, 2024.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Bailiff: Park. Not Reported. (302/RCE)
